'''''Hampton''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. With the assistance of [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]], two captured [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] pilots were able to escape from [[Stars' End/Legends|Stars' End]] prison by stowing away on the ''Hampton''. Knowing that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Furious (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Furious'']] was in the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] and was under orders to search any ships, the Rebels mounted a quick [[Rescue mission to Mytus VII|rescue]] comprising of the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] [[Mercy (Lambda-class)|''Mercy'']] and two [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]].

The Y-wings quickly destroyed the ''Hampton''{{'s}} [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] escort and disabled the ''Hampton'' ready for boarding. The ''Furious'' arrived shortly afterward and began launching TIEs of its own along with [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|stormtrooper transports]] to recapture the freighter. The Y-wings were able to hold off Imperial forces long enough for the shuttle to complete the boarding operation and the Rebels fled into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

The mission was later recreated as a simulation to help train new Rebel pilots.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
